creator: christer.edwards@gmail.com
text:
This looks good; approved. Thanks for the help Denis.

- Christer


On Thu, Nov 1, 2012 at 2:43 AM, Denis Generalov <gd@rambler-co.ru> wrote:

> On Wed, 31 Oct 2012 19:19:25 -0600
> Christer Edwards <christer.edwards@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> > Is it still pending approval? I don't think I saw an email for the latest
> > patch.
>
> Hi Christer,
>
> I sent new patch.
> You can find it in http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/173037
> Could you revise it?
>
> >
> >
> > On Sat, Oct 27, 2012 at 6:40 AM, Denis Generalov <gd@rambler-co.ru>
> wrote:
> >
> > > On Fri, 26 Oct 2012 09:41:09 -0600
> > > Christer Edwards <christer.edwards@gmail.com> wrote:
> > >
> > > > Denis -
> > > >
> > > > I'm curious what you ran into. Are you in #salt? btw, thanks for
> > > > handling some of the patches recently.
> > >
> > > I found hardcoded /etc/salt path in salt/cli/key.py
> salt/utils/parsers.py.
> > > I already sent new patch. Hope it's clear now.
> > >
> > > >
> > > > Christer
> > > >
> > > > On Fri, Oct 26, 2012 at 9:26 AM, Denis Generalov <gd@rambler-co.ru>
> > > wrote:
> > > > > On Fri, 26 Oct 2012 14:06:27 +0200
> > > > > Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> > > > >
> > > > >> Hi,
> > > > >>
> > > > >> The PR description talks about removing direct dependency on zmq,
> but
> > > > >> the LIB_DEPENDS was still there.
> > > > >>
> > > > >> I have tested removing it and the port seems to work fine(zmq is
> > > called
> > > > >> in by the RUN_DEPENDS on devel/py-pyzmq when installing).
> > > > >>
> > > > >> Could you please test and approve the attached patch without
> > > > >> LIB_DEPENDS on zmq?
> > > > >
> > > > > Hi Guido,
> > > > >
> > > > > Unfortunately I found tiny but serious problem.
> > > > > May I ask you to hold this pr?
> > > > > I will send new patch in a couple hours.
> > > > >
> > > > >>
> > > > >> thanks!
> > > > >>
> > > > >> --
> > > > >> Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
> > > > >
> > > > >
> > > > > --
> > > > > Denis Generalov <gd@rambler-co.ru>
> > >
> > >
> > > --
> > > Denis Generalov <gd@rambler-co.ru>
> > >
